Job Application form 

Dear Candidate,

We are pleased to inform you about current job openings at our esteemed organization, TTEC – Ahmedabad Site.

We kindly request you to read the full job description carefully before proceeding with the application form.

Please Note: If you have previously applied and were unsuccessful in clearing any of the interview rounds, you may reapply after 30 days.

Job Title: Chat Service Representative – Work from Office (Ahmedabad Site) 

Company: TTEC 

Job Location: Ahmedabad 

Work Schedule: Rotational Shifts 

Weekly Off: Two rotational days off per week

Important Note:

Applicants must be willing to work from our Ahmedabad office, as remote/work-from-home options are no longer available.

Job Role & Responsibilities:

Customer Service Representative (On-Site Setup)

| Respond to customer inquiries via email and chat.

| Resolve issues and provide assistance through written communication.

| In certain scenarios, make outbound calls to partners and customers.

Salary and Benefits:

CTC: ₹30,000 to ₹40,000 (based on experience and last drawn salary)

Additional Benefits: Incentives, Night Shift Allowance, Subsidized Meals, Transport Allowance, and other employee benefits.

Month of Joining: June–July 2025

Eligibility Criteria:

Educational Qualification: Minimum 12th pass (any stream), Graduate, or Postgraduate

Skills Required:

| Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English

| Proficient in computer usage (Typing speed: 35 WPM; Accuracy: minimum 85%)

| Willingness to work in rotational shifts

About the Company:

Headquartered in California, USA, TTEC is a global provider of BPO and KPO services to Fortune 500 and mid-market companies across the US, Europe, and Asia. TTEC is recognized for its open and transparent work culture and has been ranked among the Top 10 BPO companies to work for in India. It is also rated as the Best Call Center/BPO/KPO company in Gujarat.

Selection Process (Conducted Virtually):

1. Pre-Employment Assessment Test

2. HR Interview

3. Chat Assessment

4. Operations Round (Final Interview)

Note: Please apply only if you are open to relocating and working on-site at our Ahmedabad office.

Relocation Benefits:

| Complimentary accommodation and meals for the first five days upon arrival

| Reimbursement of travel expenses

| Housing assistance 

This is a free job placement. We do not charge any registration or service fees.

We look forward to receiving your application and wish you the very best in your career journey with TTEC.

Warm regards,

Credible Recruitment Team

Credible Consultancy
